description: Segment of a court testimony. In the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe ha-Levi (Date: 1100-1138). Regarding dowry arrangements after the renewal of a lost ketubba. The ketubba of Abu l-Fadl Ṣadoq b. Ḥalfon b. Moshe and his wife […] bt. Berakhot b. Yehuda ha-Levi was lost when the Franks (‘May God ruin them’) captured Tripoli (Lebanon, in 1109 CE) and Abū l-Faḍl and his wife were taken prisoner. On verso there is Genesis 1:1-3. (Information from CUDL)
tags: 12th c, testimony, Halfon b. Menashshe, ketubba, dowry
description_he: קטע עדות בית דין בכתב חלפון בן מנשה (1100–1138): על נדוניה בעת חידוש כתובה שאבדה כשהצלבנים כבשו טריפולי (1109) ואבו אל-פדל צדוק ואשתו נשבו.
